creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
This is a duplicate of ports/132136. Either try the patch in that PR or
wait for an update of libdrm port. Distfile from current version of
libdrm doesn't include following header files (fixed in git)

     libdrm-2.4.5/libdrm/nouveau/nouveau_dma.h
     libdrm-2.4.5/libdrm/nouveau/nouveau_private.h

They are necessary to build nouveau api on which new versions of
xf86-video-nouveau depend. That's why updating of this port was
postponed.

As a workaround you can apply this hack

    ftp://ftp.lissyara.su/users/Guest/libdrm.diff

and update using this patch

    ftp://ftp.lissyara.su/users/Guest/xf86-video-nouveau.diff
